7/7. Here's the summary:

---

**Root cause:** The "unexpected opcode 4" error was a bug in the integration test's raw WebSocket handshake reader, not in commons-server itself. The server is fine.

Bun coalesces the HTTP 101 Upgrade response and the first WS frame into a single TCP segment roughly 40% of the time. The test's HTTP response reader (`recv(1024)`) would grab both the 166-byte HTTP response AND the beginning of the WS welcome frame (~858 bytes) in one call. After finding `\r\n\r\n`, ...(truncated)
